features.name: Electron + Vite desktop shell with editor, preview, and action panel
Deck schema, validation, defaults, and duration/word-count utilities
5-slide Remotion composition with animated titles and scrolling content
Live preview using Remotion Player with timeline summary
Standalone HTML export using the shared deck renderer
MP4 rendering from Electron main process with progress + cancel
Design controls (fonts, colors, margins, font size, background image, layout)
Automated smoke tests for HTML export and MP4 rendering
Render speed presets for faster MP4 exports
features.tests: npm test, npm exec tsc --noEmit, npm run build
